questions.text: What's your coffee order when you're at a café in Mexico — do you stick to familiar drinks or use ordering as a way to explore local specialties?
When you're buying clothing, how much does brand transparency (who made it, where, under what conditions) factor into your decision? Is there a price point where you stop caring as much?
Between online shopping and in-person browsing, what's your split? Do you research heavily online before buying in stores, or do you prefer one channel entirely?

What does your ideal 5-year roadmap look like? Are there specific milestones (financial, career, location, relationship) you actively plan toward, or do you prefer to stay flexible and let opportunities emerge?
When you meet new people in a city (at volleyball, coworking, etc.), how do you typically decide whether to invest in building a deeper friendship versus keeping it as a casual acquaintance?
